---
title: "Home"
about:
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
  image: images/_DSC4929.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:henzel@lawrence.edu
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/Laura-Henze
---
:::{#intro-heading}
## About Me!

---

::: {#bio}

Hi there! I'm Laura (pronounced "LOR-uh"). I am an Undergraduate Student at [Lawrence University](https://www.lawrence.edu/) in the Biochemistry, Data Science, and Anthropology departments. I'm a Wisconsin native and have kept my roots here ever since I was born. Prior to my time at Lawrence, I graduated near the top of my class from my alma mater, Plymouth High School where I gained my love for science. In the future, I plan to attend a Forensic Science graduate institute in order to specialize in Forensic Toxicology. 

Through my explorations of research at Lawrence, I came to discover that data processing was something that I didn't know about, but seemed like a handy skill to have. With this, I discovered my enjoyment of data science and producing informative figures for my technical lab reports. 


In addition to my academics, I compete on the Lawrence [Cross Country](https://vikings.lawrence.edu/sports/wcross) and [Track and Field](https://vikings.lawrence.edu/sports/wcross) teams in my extra time. Running has continued to be one of my passions since I was young and I'm very greatful to represent my team here. In addition to running and my studies, I also enjoy singing, watching movies, playing videogames, and practicing my flute (when I have the time).
